summary.snippet: "Excellent service, great environment, clean space, great atmosphere!"
"Stuck in a hallway tucked behind the pediatric nurses desk."
"They are hard workers, high quality professionals and people with kind hearts."

most_relevant.description: I’m in the kids ER. While my child need to be attended to I’m going through several spam in my entire back. I was accused by an African American nurse with braid that I am having attitude. I’m trying to explain to her but was turn over to speak with a police. All I needed was my daughter clothes. We in hall way waiting with 2 other kid. A 9 yrs old and a 2 year old. 5/2/2026-5/3/2026 presently at 12:53 am.

Extremely caring staff here! The nurses and doctors are both extremely knowledgeable and the care here is well above the norm. And since it is in New York City, they have some of the finest doctors in the world practicing here. They are always improving their facilities and upgrading their equipment to ensure that you received the best care possible in the area. There are plenty of parking garages in the area and some on street parking. There are also plenty of food places in the area to grab something to eat. If you are waiting for someone while they're getting tests done. They also have a nice Cafe on the basement level that has very good food as well. All in all, this is one of the finest hospitals in the area!

This hospital has been my parent's local hospital for 80 years. There are some great nurses and doctors, and also many who are very lax and the ER is often backed up leaving patients in hallways and unattended. I've witnessed fall risk patients left unaided when they needed timely assistance. I'm not sure what the remedy is, but if you can, please ensure you or someone is there to help advocate for proper care.

My wife was recently admitted in NYP for car-t cell transplant, and had an exceptional experience from start to finish. The facility was clean, well-organized, and efficient. The reception staff was friendly and made the check-in process seamless.

Her doctors were not only knowledgeable but also took the time to thoroughly explain my condition and treatment options. The nursing staff was incredibly kind, attentive, and made sure I was comfortable throughout my stay. I truly appreciated their patience and professionalism.
Oncologist Dr Mejia is an outstanding physician.

The hospital also maintained excellent hygiene and safety protocols, which made me feel secure during my visit. Overall, I’m extremely grateful for the outstanding care I received and would highly recommend NYP to anyone in need of medical attention.

I have nothing but good things to say about this hospital. All of the staff we encountered were professional, personable and supportive. Each member of the medical team impressed us with their excellent bedside manner and vested interest in helping our family member. The hospital itself is beautiful and clean. The hallways are decorated with children’s artwork, putting a smile on your face when you need it.

My daughter was recently a patient in the excellent neuro surgery department.  She was very well cared for in the Neuro ICU.
However, the hospital must do something to adjust the process for visitors to the Greenberg Pavilion .  At 7:30 PM there was a line of at least 50- 75 people waiting to get a pass to visit.  There was one worker who had to provide a pass with a useless, blurred picture of the visitor.

I travel to bring my kids here anytime they’re sick because this is truly the best pediatric hospital I’ve ever been to. The staff is always incredibly attentive to both patients and parents. Teachers visit the rooms to help kids stay on track with schoolwork, the playroom is super fun, therapy animals stop by to brighten their day, and the entire team is just amazing. Highly recommend!!!!!

I have had two open Heart surgeries here with Dr. Michael Leonard my GP, who initially heard a new murmur and sent me for further tests.  Dr. David Miller as my cardiologist, who is a Superstar, all his patients adore him!  Finally Dr. Len Girardi who is The Best! The Nursing staff were fantastic, professional and kind.  Everyone from the Techs, Food and nutrition, Environmental services, were thoughtful and kind.  Highly recommend.
